sources.title: 周敦颐《太极图说》
sources.citation_zh: 〔宋〕周敦颐：《太极图说》，《重刊道藏辑要》本《周濂溪先生太极图》，中国哲学书电子化计划电子本。
sources.citation_en: Zhou Dunyi, Taijitu shuo (Explanation of the Diagram of the Supreme Ultimate), Chongkan Daozang jiyao edition of Zhou Lianxi xiansheng Taijitu, Chinese Text Project digital text.

sources.title: 邵雍《皇极经世》卷十一
sources.citation_zh: 〔宋〕邵雍：《皇极经世》卷十一〈观物篇五十一〉，维基文库四库全书系统电子本。
sources.citation_en: Shao Yong, Huangji jingshi, juan 11, 'Guanwu pian 51,' Wikisource digital text in the Siku textual tradition.

sources.title: 张载《正蒙·太和篇》
sources.citation_zh: 〔宋〕张载：《正蒙》卷一〈太和篇第一〉，维基文库电子校录本。
sources.citation_en: Zhang Zai, Zhengmeng, juan 1, 'Taihe,' chapter 1, Wikisource digital transcription.

sources.title: 程颢〈识仁篇〉（《河南程氏遗书》卷二上）
sources.citation_zh: 〔宋〕程颢口述，门人记录：〈识仁篇〉，《河南程氏遗书》卷二上；参《性理大全书》卷四所录，中国哲学书电子化计划电子本。
sources.citation_en: Cheng Hao, 'Shiren pian' (Discerning Ren), disciple record in Henan Chengshi yishu, juan 2A; parallel text in Xingli daquan shu, juan 4, Chinese Text Project.

sources.title: 程颐《河南程氏遗书》卷十八
sources.citation_zh: 〔宋〕程颐口述，门人记录：《河南程氏遗书》卷十八，收入王孝鱼点校《二程集》，北京：中华书局，1981年。
sources.citation_en: Cheng Yi, disciple record in Henan Chengshi yishu, juan 18; in Wang Xiaoyu, ed., Er Cheng ji (Beijing: Zhonghua Book Company, 1981).

sources.title: 朱熹〈仁说〉
sources.citation_zh: 〔宋〕朱熹：〈仁说〉，《晦庵先生朱文公文集》卷六十七；《朱熹集》，成都：四川教育出版社，1996年。
sources.citation_en: Zhu Xi, 'Renshuo' (Treatise on Ren), Hui'an xiansheng Zhu Wengong wenji, juan 67; Zhu Xi ji (Chengdu: Sichuan Education Press, 1996).

sources.title: 《象山先生全集》卷三十六·年谱
sources.citation_zh: 〔宋〕陆九渊语，门人及家人编次：《象山先生全集》卷三十六〈年谱〉；参钟哲点校《陆九渊集》，北京：中华书局，1980年，卷三十六。
sources.citation_en: Saying of Lu Jiuyuan preserved in the chronological biography, Xiangshan xiansheng quanji, juan 36; see Zhong Zhe, ed., Lu Jiuyuan ji (Beijing: Zhonghua Book Company, 1980), juan 36.

sources.title: 王阳明《传习录》上·徐爱录
sources.citation_zh: 〔明〕王守仁口述，徐爱记录：《传习录》上〈徐爱录〉；吴光等编校《王阳明全集》，上海：上海古籍出版社，2011年。
sources.citation_en: Wang Yangming (Wang Shouren), recorded by Xu Ai, Chuanxilu, part 1, 'Xu Ai lu'; in Wu Guang et al., eds., Wang Yangming quanji (Shanghai: Shanghai Classics Publishing House, 2011).

sources.title: 李贽《焚书》卷三·童心说
sources.citation_zh: 〔明〕李贽：〈童心说〉，《焚书》卷三；张建业主编《李贽全集注》，北京：社会科学文献出版社，2010年。
sources.citation_en: Li Zhi, 'Tongxin shuo' (On the Childlike Mind), Fen shu, juan 3; in Zhang Jianye, ed., Li Zhi quanji zhu (Beijing: Social Sciences Academic Press, 2010).

sources.title: 黄宗羲《明夷待访录·原君》
sources.citation_zh: 〔清〕黄宗羲：《明夷待访录·原君》，中国哲学书电子化计划电子本。
sources.citation_en: Huang Zongxi, 'Yuan jun' (On the Ruler), Mingyi daifang lu, Chinese Text Project digital text.

sources.title: 王夫之《周易外传》卷五
sources.citation_zh: 〔清〕王夫之：《周易外传》卷五，释《系辞上传》第十二章，中国哲学书电子化计划电子本。
sources.citation_en: Wang Fuzhi, Zhouyi waizhuan, juan 5, commentary on Xici zhuan I, chapter 12, Chinese Text Project digital text.

sources.title: 戴震《孟子字义疏证》卷上·理
sources.citation_zh: 〔清〕戴震：《孟子字义疏证》卷上〈理〉，中华书局1982年标点本；Wesleyan University 中国哲学电子文本计划电子本。
sources.citation_en: Dai Zhen, Mengzi ziyi shuzheng, first juan, 'Li,' punctuated Zhonghua Book Company edition (1982); Wesleyan University Chinese Philosophical Etext Archive.

claims.text_zh: 无极而太极的本原通过动静分化为阴阳，再经五行与阴阳的结合化生万物。
claims.text_en: The formless Supreme Ultimate differentiates through activity and stillness into yin and yang, whose articulation through the Five Phases generates the myriad things.
claims.explanation_zh: 这条命题把“无极而太极”、阴阳动静和五行化生作为同一宇宙生成论的连续环节；它没有把太极解释成一个与变化世界分离的物体。
claims.explanation_en: This claim joins the formless Supreme Ultimate, yin-yang activity and stillness, and Five-Phase generation into one cosmological sequence; it does not treat taiji as a separate object outside change.
claims.locator: 《太极图说》开篇至“五气顺布，四时行焉”
claims.excerpt_text: 無極而太極。太極動而生陽，動極而靜；靜而生陰，靜極復動。一動一靜，互為其根。分陰分陽，兩儀立焉。陽變陰合，而生水火木金土。五氣順布，四時行焉。
claims.attribution_note: 作者署名为周敦颐；电子本据《重刊道藏辑要》本，公开前仍应以整理本复核异文。

claims.text_zh: 天地的生成与作用可由动静、阴阳、刚柔等成对范畴的交互得到系统说明。
claims.text_en: The generation and operation of heaven and earth can be systematically explained through interacting pairs such as activity and stillness, yin and yang, and hardness and softness.
claims.explanation_zh: 邵雍以结构化的对应关系解释宇宙秩序：天生于动、地生于静，阴阳穷尽天之用，刚柔穷尽地之用。命题保留其象数宇宙论的结构，而没有把后人概括的“机械循环”当作原话。
claims.explanation_en: Shao explains cosmic order through structured correlations: heaven arises from activity, earth from stillness; yin-yang exhaust heaven's operation and hard-soft exhaust earth's. The claim preserves this correlative structure without attributing later labels to him.
claims.locator: 《皇极经世》卷十一〈观物篇五十一〉首段至第三段
claims.excerpt_text: 天，生於動者也。地，生於靜者也。一動一靜交，而天地之道盡之矣。動之始，則陽生焉；動之極，則陰生焉。一陰一陽交，而天之用盡之矣。靜之始，則柔生焉；靜之極，則剛生焉。一柔一剛交，而地之用盡之矣。
claims.attribution_note: 取《观物内篇》正文；不采用归属较复杂的《观物外篇》语录作为本条核心证据。

claims.text_zh: 太虚不是与气分离的虚无，而是气的无形本体；万物只是气聚散变化的暂时形态。
claims.text_en: The Great Void is not a nothingness separate from qi but qi's formless body; things are temporary configurations produced by qi's condensation and dispersal.
claims.explanation_zh: 这一区分使生成与消散成为气自身的变化，反对从绝对虚无产生存在，也反对把现象世界视为虚幻投影。
claims.explanation_en: This makes generation and dissolution transformations internal to qi, rejecting both creation from absolute nothingness and the treatment of the phenomenal world as an illusory projection.
claims.locator: 《正蒙》卷一〈太和篇第一〉第二节
claims.excerpt_text: 太虛無形，氣之本體，其聚其散，變化之客形爾。
claims.attribution_note: 《正蒙》为张载本人著作；标点依电子校录本，公开前应与中华书局整理本复核。

claims.text_zh: 仁不是一项孤立德目，而是人与万物浑然同体的德性基础，义、礼、智、信都是仁的具体展开。
claims.text_en: Ren is not an isolated virtue but the ethical ground of one's integral unity with all things; righteousness, ritual propriety, wisdom, and trustworthiness are its concrete articulations.
claims.explanation_zh: 这条命题连接程颢的仁论、万物一体论与存养工夫；“同体”不是取消分殊，而是说明道德关怀的本体基础。
claims.explanation_en: The claim connects Cheng Hao's account of ren, unity with all things, and moral cultivation. 'One body' supplies an ontological basis for concern without erasing concrete distinctions.
claims.locator: 《河南程氏遗书》卷二上〈识仁篇〉开篇
claims.excerpt_text: 學者須先識仁。仁者渾然與物同體，義禮智信皆仁也。識得此理，以誠敬存之而已。
claims.attribution_note: 属程门弟子记录的程颢语录，而非程颢手定文稿；《性理大全书》保存平行文本。

claims.text_zh: 道德修养必须同时通过敬来涵养心志，并通过致知来推进对事理的认识。
claims.text_en: Moral cultivation must both nurture the mind through reverent attentiveness and advance understanding through the extension of knowledge.
claims.explanation_zh: 程颐把“敬”与“致知”置于同一工夫结构中：前者维持心的端正专一，后者要求在事物中不断明理，二者不能互相替代。
claims.explanation_en: Cheng Yi places reverence and the extension of knowledge within one structure of cultivation: the former maintains focused moral attention, while the latter progressively clarifies principles in affairs; neither substitutes for the other.
claims.locator: 《河南程氏遗书》卷十八，论涵养与进学条
claims.excerpt_text: 涵養須用敬，進學則在致知。
claims.attribution_note: 属门人所记程颐语录；该句在二程文献与后世引录中归属稳定，但仍标明记录体性质。

claims.text_zh: 仁是天地生生不息的生物之心，人禀得这一生意作为自身之心与众德之源。
claims.text_en: Ren is the generative heart through which heaven and earth bring forth life, received by human beings as their own heart and the source of the virtues.
claims.explanation_zh: 朱熹以“生物之心”贯通宇宙生成与人伦道德，使仁既不是外加规范，也不只是主观情感，而是在人心中实现的生生之理。
claims.explanation_en: By calling ren the 'generative heart,' Zhu Xi links cosmic generation and human ethics: ren is neither an externally imposed norm nor merely a subjective feeling, but generative pattern realized in the human heart.
claims.locator: 《晦庵先生朱文公文集》卷六十七〈仁说〉首段
claims.excerpt_text: 天地以生物為心者也，而人物之生，又各得夫天地之心以為心者也。故語心之德，雖其總攝貫通，無所不備，然一言以蔽之，則曰仁而已矣。
claims.attribution_note: 朱熹本人论说文；不同版本字句或有细微差异，卷次与篇名明确。

claims.text_zh: 吾心与宇宙并非彼此外在的两物；宇宙之理就在本心中，修养首先要求反求并确立此心。
claims.text_en: Mind and cosmos are not two externally opposed things: cosmic principle is present in the original mind, so cultivation begins by recovering and establishing that mind.
claims.explanation_zh: “吾心即宇宙”不是说个人的任意念头创造世界，而是强调普遍之理与人的本心相贯通，并由此确立向内反省的工夫路径。
claims.explanation_en: 'My mind is the cosmos' does not mean that arbitrary private thoughts create the world; it asserts continuity between universal principle and the original mind and grounds an inwardly reflective path of cultivation.
claims.locator: 《陆九渊集》卷三十六〈年谱〉，少年读“宇宙”二字条
claims.excerpt_text: 宇宙便是吾心，吾心即是宇宙。
claims.attribution_note: 此语由年谱保存为陆九渊少年时所书，并非现存亲笔原稿；因此来源类型明确标为早期传记编次，不能伪装成手定论说文。

claims.text_zh: 真正的知与行是同一工夫的两个方面：知引导行动，行动完成并证实所知，二者不可割裂。
claims.text_en: Genuine knowing and acting are two aspects of one practice: knowing directs action, while action completes and verifies knowing, so the two cannot be separated.
claims.explanation_zh: 知行合一针对的是把道德知识停留在口头、把实践推迟到“知道以后”的倾向；它不是否认概念上的区分，而是否认修养中的分离。
claims.explanation_en: The unity of knowing and acting targets the tendency to leave moral knowledge verbal and postpone practice until 'after knowing.' It does not erase their conceptual distinction but rejects their separation in cultivation.
claims.locator: 《传习录》上〈徐爱录〉，答徐爱知行先后之问
claims.excerpt_text: 知是行之始，行是知之成。聖學只一箇功夫，知行不可分作兩事。
claims.attribution_note: 由弟子徐爱记录王阳明答问；并非王阳明手定逐字稿，故保留记录者与问答语境。

claims.text_zh: 童心是未被虚假成见遮蔽的真实本心；一旦失去童心，真实的言说与文章也随之失去根基。
claims.text_en: The childlike mind is the genuine original mind unobscured by falsifying conventions; once it is lost, truthful speech and writing lose their ground.
claims.explanation_zh: 李贽的童心论既批判伪道学造成的虚假人格，也构成其文学真实性标准；这里的“童”指绝假纯真，并非幼稚或拒绝学习。
claims.explanation_en: Li Zhi's account criticizes the false personality produced by orthodox pretension and supplies a criterion of literary authenticity. 'Childlike' means free of falsification, not immature or hostile to learning.
claims.excerpt_text: 夫童心者，真心也；若以童心為不可，是以真心為不可也。夫童心者，絕假純真，最初一念之本心也。
claims.attribution_note: 李贽本人署名文章；规范命题只概括开篇定义及其文论后果，不把“童心”泛化为现代个人主义。

claims.text_zh: 天下及其公共利益应当是政治的主体，君主只是为天下履职的客体，统治的正当性取决于是否为天下谋利。
claims.text_en: The realm and its common welfare should be the subject of politics; the ruler is only an officeholder serving it, and rule is legitimate insofar as it works for the realm's benefit.
claims.explanation_zh: “天下为主，君为客”颠倒了以君主私利为中心的政治关系，把君职理解为公共责任；它不等同于现代民主制度，但对专制君权构成根本批判。
claims.explanation_en: 'The realm as host, ruler as guest' reverses ruler-centered politics and treats rulership as a public responsibility. It is not identical with modern democracy, but it is a fundamental critique of autocratic rulership.
claims.excerpt_text: 古者以天下為主，君為客，凡君之所畢世而經營者，為天下也。今也以君為主，天下為客，凡天下之無地而得安寧者，為君也。
claims.attribution_note: 黄宗羲本人政论；“公共利益”是对“为天下”的规范化表达，不据此直接贴上现代民主标签。

claims.text_zh: 道不能脱离具体的器而独立存在；没有具体事物与实践载体，就没有可实现的道。
claims.text_en: Dao cannot exist independently apart from concrete vessels; without concrete things and practical embodiments, there is no realizable dao.
claims.explanation_zh: 王夫之以“天下惟器”反对把道悬置于器物之外。道是具体存在、制度与实践中的条理，而不是另一个驱动世界的超验实体。
claims.explanation_en: With 'all under heaven consists only of vessels,' Wang Fuzhi rejects placing dao outside concrete things. Dao is the ordering within existents, institutions, and practices, not a separate transcendent entity that drives them.
claims.locator: 《周易外传》卷五，释《系辞上传》第十二章，第二节（中国哲学书电子化计划行174—176）
claims.excerpt_text: 天下惟器而已矣。道者器之道，器者不可謂之道之器也。無其器則無其道，人鮮能言之，而固其誠然者也。
claims.attribution_note: 王夫之本人著作；locator同时保留传统卷章节与电子文本行号，便于复核。

claims.text_zh: 理不是压制人情的外在命令，而是使自己与他人的情欲都得到无过无不及之实现的恰当准则。
claims.text_en: Li is not an external command that suppresses human feeling, but the fitting norm by which one's own and others' feelings and desires are fulfilled without excess or deficiency.
claims.explanation_zh: 戴震把理落实在“情之不爽失”与以情絜情之中，以此批判借抽象天理剥夺他人正当欲求的做法；“情得”并不等于欲望毫无限制。
claims.explanation_en: Dai grounds li in the unerring fulfillment of feeling and in measuring others' feelings by one's own, thereby criticizing appeals to abstract principle that deny legitimate human desires. Fulfillment does not mean wholly unrestrained desire.
claims.excerpt_text: 理也者，情之不爽失也；未有情不得而理得者也。
claims.attribution_note: 戴震本人著作；规范命题结合本节上下文解释“情得”，不将其简化为纵欲论。
